result: If I had the power to change the world in just one way, I’d make high-quality education universally accessible. When people can learn freely—regardless of where they were born, their background, or how much money they have—it unlocks opportunities, inspires innovation, and builds empathy. Education is one of those changes that keeps generating more positive ripples; it helps break cycles of poverty, strengthens communities, and gives individuals the tools to navigate challenges and shape their own futures.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
